verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I lift my voice I lift my praise to You I lift my hands I lift my worship to You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I love You more than I can say Oh I love You more than I can say

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Ever I will sing only You will I adore Glorify my Lord only You will I serve For the world will fade away Still my song to You remains Only You will I Adore

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh I love You always Jesus. Oh I love You always Jesus. Oh I love You always Jesus.
